theorem: APF charged-lepton trace-vector closure from down-family trace source and pole-LO export candidate
claim: v41 closes the charged-lepton APF trace vector using T_l=diag(1/3,3,1) T_d and promotes charged leptons to a leading-order pole export candidate, not a final physical mass theorem.

new_closed.no_double_count_gate: R_d_to_l is source map only; applying it again to T_l is forbidden
new_closed.G1_G2_status: pole codomain and LO transport map closed

diagnostic_only_external_comparison.note: external pole masses are used only after the APF route is fixed; they do not define T_l or coefficients

still_open.QED_pole_finite_transport: needed to explain residual vector beyond LO
still_open.numeric_trace_covariance: deferred until Sigma_d is imported from trace-sector bank
still_open.running_codomain: MSbar(mu) requires QED running constants and thresholds

gate_status.G2_TRANSPORT_MAP: closed at LO: Phi=nu_l R_d_to_l T_d
gate_status.G3_CONSTANTS_LEDGER: closed for APF-side LO ledger: T_d,N_c,nu_l; QED constants deferred for residual/running
gate_status.G4_COVARIANCE: formal propagation closed; numeric Sigma_d deferred
gate_status.G5_NO_SMUGGLING: pass: no charged-lepton target masses used in source or route
gate_status.G6_RESIDUAL_CHANNELS: pass at candidate level: QED/pole, APF-route, trace-covariance, experimental channels named

promotion.before: charged leptons: P_source_gate^T_l + P_codomain^pole_ready / not exported
promotion.after: charged leptons: P_export_candidate^pole_LO / not physical final
not_claimed: pole mass derivation to experimental precision
